Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: GISELLE CASEY, #8098

KEITH FERRARA, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JOHN D. LEVENHAGEN, who was present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant R.A.H. CORPORATION DBA NATIONAL RENT-A-CAR.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JOHN D. LEVENHAGEN, and against the Defaulted Defendant R.A.H. CORPORATION DBA NATIONAL RENT-A-CAR as follows:
DAMAGES $56,587.28; COSTS $964. TOTALING $57,551.28

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jay Chafetz, Esq. appeared with plaintiff John D. Levenhagen, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant John Wolfe Stayman.
Default was entered against defendant John Wolfe Stayman on April 16, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 29, 2010.
Statement of Damages was served on defendant John Wolfe Stayman on September 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff John D. Levenhagen, and against the Defaulted Defendant John Wolfe Stayman as follows:

Damages/Principal - $56,587.28.
Costs - $505.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $57,092.28.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
